title: Michael Tsai - Blog  -  EU Exempts Apple Watch and AirPods From Battery Removal Requirement
content_html:
Hartley Charlton:

The European Commission yesterday adopted new exemptions to its Batteries Regulation that free the Apple Watch and AirPods from having to offer user-removable and replaceable batteries.

[…]

The reasoning largely mirrors why devices like electric toothbrushes were already exempt: Opening a compact, sealed enclosure and failing to reseal it properly could let water in and create a safety risk. Products can also qualify for exemption if their construction makes battery removal inherently dangerous, or if there is no realistic way to build in user access given current manufacturing methods.

[…]

The iPhone was already exempt from the removability rule under the original regulation, thanks to its battery cycle life and water resistance rating.

Marcus Mendes:

Although the Commission has adopted the exemption, it must still undergo scrutiny by the European Parliament and the Council of the EU.

[…]

To read the European Commission’s full delegated act, follow this link.

Previously:

  • DMA Compliance: Watch and Headphone Interoperability
  • European Union USB-C Mandate
  • EU Wants All Phones to Work With Interoperable Chargers

Update (2026-07-20): See also: Hacker News.

AirPods Apple Watch Battery Replacement European Union Hardware iPhone Legal Unauthorized Repair

12 Comments

Products can also qualify for exemption if their construction makes battery removal inherently dangerous, or if there is no realistic way to build in user access given current manufacturing methods. […] The iPhone was already exempt from the removability rule under the original regulation, thanks to its battery cycle life and water resistance rating. Marcus Mendes: Although the Commission has adopted the exemption, it must still undergo scrutiny by the European Parliament and the Council of the EU. […] To read the European Commission’s full delegated act, follow this link. sentences.en: Hartley Charlton:
sentences.zh: 哈特利·查尔顿：

blocks.html_en:
The European Commission yesterday adopted new exemptions to its Batteries Regulation that free the Apple Watch and AirPods from having to offer user-removable and replaceable batteries.

[…]

The reasoning largely mirrors why devices like electric toothbrushes were already exempt: Opening a compact, sealed enclosure and failing to reseal it properly could let water in and create a safety risk. Products can also qualify for exemption if their construction makes battery removal inherently dangerous, or if there is no realistic way to build in user access given current manufacturing methods.

[…]

The iPhone was already exempt from the removability rule under the original regulation, thanks to its battery cycle life and water resistance rating.

sentences.en: The European Commission yesterday adopted new exemptions to its Batteries Regulation that free the Apple Watch and AirPods from having to offer user-removable and replaceable batteries. […]
sentences.zh: 欧盟委员会昨天通过了电池法规的新豁免，使 Apple Watch 和 AirPods 不必提供用户可拆卸和更换的电池。 […]

sentences.en: The reasoning largely mirrors why devices like electric toothbrushes were already exempt: Opening a compact, sealed enclosure and failing to reseal it properly could let water in and create a safety risk.
sentences.zh: 其推理在很大程度上反映了为什么像电动牙刷这样的设备已经被豁免：打开一个紧凑的密封外壳并且未能正确重新密封它可能会让水进入并造成安全风险。

sentences.en: Products can also qualify for exemption if their construction makes battery removal inherently dangerous, or if there is no realistic way to build in user access given current manufacturing methods. […]
sentences.zh: 如果产品的结构使得电池拆卸本身存在危险，或者如果在当前的制造方法下没有现实的方法来建立用户访问权限，那么产品也有资格获得豁免。 […]

sentences.en: The iPhone was already exempt from the removability rule under the original regulation, thanks to its battery cycle life and water resistance rating.
sentences.zh: 由于其电池循环寿命和防水等级，iPhone 已经不受原始法规中可拆卸规则的约束。

content_html_zh:
哈特利·查尔顿：

欧盟委员会昨天通过了电池法规的新豁免，使 Apple Watch 和 AirPods 不必提供用户可拆卸和更换的电池。 […] 其推理在很大程度上反映了为什么像电动牙刷这样的设备已经被豁免：打开一个紧凑的密封外壳并且未能正确重新密封它可能会让水进入并造成安全风险。 如果产品的结构使得电池拆卸本身存在危险，或者如果在当前的制造方法下没有现实的方法来建立用户访问权限，那么产品也有资格获得豁免。 […] 由于其电池循环寿命和防水等级，iPhone 已经不受原始法规中可拆卸规则的约束。

马库斯·门德斯：

尽管欧盟委员会已经通过了豁免，但仍须接受欧洲议会和欧盟理事会的审查。 […] 要阅读欧盟委员会的完整授权法案，请点击此链接。
